author: someone114514
name: SP8192 + Strict Full-Val Byte PPM Mixture
technique_summary: SP8192 base stack + strict full-validation byte-level PPM-D mixture in eval_val_sliding, prefix-only confidence gate, score-before-update byte counts, native C scorer, compact raw per-rank collection, and no TTT in the packed artifact.

new_controls.PPM_ENABLED: 0 by default; set to 1 to enable strict PPM mixture
new_controls.PPM_DEBUG_SUBSET_TOKENS: 0 for formal full-val scoring; positive values are debug-only and must not be submitted
new_controls.SKIP_QUANTIZED_EVAL: 1 in submitted logs; skips plain quantized eval

attribution.base_stack: 2026-04-09 SP8192 + 3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals + QK-gain 5.25 + legal TTT record and credited lineage
attribution.ppm_idea: PR #1835 / #1795 discussion; this implementation uses strict full-val scoring and prefix-only gating

review_notes: The submitted score is a byte-level online PPM mixture over full validation bytes. Logs include nn_token_bpb, nn_byte_bpb, ppm_only, and mix_bpb for auditability.
